findingsNew.claim: Generated phase-parent spec scope text still emits private manifest vocabulary despite ADR-005/workflow-invariance cleanup requirements.
findingsNew.counterevidenceSought: Checked the clean phase-parent manifest template and workflow-invariance scan scope; the template uses Sub-phase list, but create.sh substitutes child phase manifest into generated body text and the invariance test does not scaffold/scan that output.
findingsNew.alternativeExplanation: The word manifest could be read generically as a phase listing, but this exact public wording class was called out for cleanup and the generated spec is AI-readable.
findingsNew.downgradeTrigger: Downgrade only if maintainers explicitly allow child phase manifest in public scaffold output or if another generated-output gate already blocks this release.

spec_code.notes: Generated phase-parent scope text contradicts private-vocabulary cleanup requirement.

checklist_evidence.notes: No applied/T-*.md files were present; sampled spec and implementation-summary claims.

resource_map_coverage.notes: Manifest/resolver/renderer/scaffolder/invariance surfaces sampled; legacy template dirs absent.

overlay.notes: Workflow-invariance test does not exercise generated phase-parent body text.

findingDetails.title: Phase-parent scaffolding still emits private manifest vocabulary into generated public spec text
findingDetails.evidence: create.sh renders the phase-parent template and substitutes scope rows containing child phase manifest, while the spec requires private vocabulary cleanup and generated public surfaces to remain workflow-invariant.
findingDetails.recommendation: Replace the generated scope text with taxonomy-neutral wording such as child phase list or phase map, and extend workflow-invariance coverage to rendered phase-parent output.
findingDetails.scopeProof: rg over create.sh, phase-parent template, workflow-invariance test, agents, and command surfaces found this generated-output substitution site.

title: Phase-parent scaffolding still emits private manifest vocabulary into generated public spec text

detail: Spec requires public workflow invariance and calls out manifest wording cleanup; create.sh generated phase-parent scope text still says child phase manifest.
workflow-invariance.vitest.ts scans text surfaces and live help but not generated phase-parent body output from create.sh.
P1 because this is a required spec-alignment and release-gate issue, not a runtime crash or exploitable security defect.

reason: Glob for deleted legacy template directories returned no matches; not a gap in this iteration.
